expectations.text: Subject line is 2-4 words, lowercase, no emojis or exclamation points
expectations.evidence: Subject: 'StyleHub's Vogue moment — here's how to turn that into 35% better ROAS' (13 words, lowercase=False)

expectations.text: Opening references the Vogue feature naturally (not as flattery, but as a trigger for the conversation)
Email connects the trigger (Vogue feature) to the challenge (scaling ad creative testing)
Specific proof point included (ThreadCraft: 35% ROAS improvement, 10x creative variants)
No AI-telltale patterns ('I came across', 'I noticed', 'congratulations on')
Every sentence serves the reader (not the sender)
Does not mention your company name until after establishing value
